title: bossiaea prostrata
intro: Bossiaea prostrata, also known as the creeping bossiaea, is a low-growing shrub native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and has been used to treat conditions such as arthritis and wounds. Herbal preparations of Bossiaea prostrata often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves or stems, which can be used to create teas, salves, or ointments for topical application.
